zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Richardson於1603年出生在英國時，他的父親Thomas Richardson34歲，母親Katherine Duxford38歲。他於1632年10月18日與Joane Thake在英國賀特福爾格亞特 霍亞德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1658年3月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年55歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Richardson于1603年出生在英国时，他的父亲Thomas Richardson34岁，母亲Katherine Duxford38岁。他于1632年10月18日与Joane Thake在英国賀特福爾格亞特 霍亞德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1658年3月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年55岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Richardson was born in 1603, in England, his father, Thomas Richardson, was 34 and his mother, Katherine Duxford, was 38. He married Joane Thake on 18 October 1632, in Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 March 1658, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 55, and was buried in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Richardson est né en 1603, à Angleterre, son père, Thomas Richardson, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Katherine Duxford, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Joane Thake le 18 octobre 1632, à Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1658, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

Oktober 1632 in Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, England Joane Thake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. März 1658 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Richardson è nato il nel 1603 nel England, il suo padre, Thomas Richardson, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Duxford, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Joane Thake il 18 ottobre 1632, nel Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 marzo 1658, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Richardsonが1603年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Richardsonは34歳，母Katherine Duxfordは38歳であった。1632年10月18日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアグレアト ホールメアドでJoane Thakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1658年3月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで55歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルンフィルスト ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Richardson(이)가 1603년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Richardson(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Duxford(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1632년 10월 18일 영국 허트퍼드실르 그리트 호미드에서 Joane Thake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1658년 3월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Richardson nasceu em 1603, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Richardson, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Duxford, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Thake em 18 de outubro de 1632, em Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de março de 1658, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Richardson родился в 1603 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Richardson было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Duxford, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Thake 18 октября 1632 г. в местности грит хаурмид, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 марта 1658 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности фирст буряль гроунд, вобурн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Richardson nació en 1603, en Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Richardson, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Katherine Duxford, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Joane Thake el 18 de octubre de 1632, en Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1658, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
